title: Undergraduate Black Law Student's Association
subtitle: Director of Campus Outreach — August 2025 – Present
bullets: Lead campus outreach initiatives for UBLSA, building and sustaining partnerships with Ole Miss Law School BLSA and student organizations across campus
Develop and execute programming on legal career pathways, mentorship opportunities, and law school preparation resources
Support executive board in steering UBLSA toward organizational goals; manage new member recruitment, and represent UBLSA at university-wide events
